# GitHub Copilot Instructions

See [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) — GitHub Copilot should follow the same
instructions as every other coding agent working in this repository,
including the **ForgeGuard Fork — Additions Below This Line** section at the
end covering this fork's PR policy and plan-saving rule.

This file exists only because GitHub Copilot looks specifically for
`.github/copilot-instructions.md`. Do not duplicate content here — update
`AGENTS.md` instead and this file stays a thin pointer.
